initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN dc_count > marvel_count THEN 'DC Comics'
    WHEN marvel_count > dc_count THEN 'Marvel Comics'
    ELSE 'Tie'
  END AS publisher_with_more_superheroes,
  ABS(dc_count - marvel_count) AS difference
FROM (
  SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dc_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_count
  FROM superhero s
  JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
  WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
) subquery;

SELECT 
  publisher.publisher_name,
  COUNT(superhero.id) AS superhero_count
FROM publisher
JOIN superhero ON publisher.id = superhero.publisher_id
WHERE publisher.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
GROUP BY publisher.publisher_name;

SELECT 
  publisher.publisher_name,
  COUNT(superhero.id) AS superhero_count
FROM publisher
JOIN superhero ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
WHERE publisher.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
GROUP BY publisher.publisher_name;

SELECT 
    publisher.publisher_name,
    COUNT(superhero.id) AS superhero_count
FROM 
    publisher
JOIN 
    superhero ON publisher.id = superhero.publisher_id
WHERE 
    publisher.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
GROUP BY 
    publisher.publisher_name;

SELECT 
  publisher.publisher_name,
  COUNT(superhero.id) AS superhero_count
FROM 
  publisher
  INNER JOIN superhero ON publisher.id = superhero.publisher_id
WHERE 
  publisher.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
GROUP BY 
  publisher.publisher_name;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
  publisher.publisher_name,
  COUNT(superhero.id) AS superhero_count
FROM 
  publisher
  INNER JOIN superhero ON publisher.id = superhero.publisher_id
WHERE 
  publisher.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
GROUP BY 
  publisher.publisher_name;

candidates.sql:
WITH dc_marvel_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    publisher.publisher_name,
    COUNT(superhero.id) AS superhero_count
  FROM 
    publisher
    INNER JOIN superhero ON publisher.id = superhero.publisher_id
  WHERE 
    publisher.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
  GROUP BY 
    publisher.publisher_name
)
SELECT 
  MAX(CASE WHEN publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN superhero_count ELSE 0 END) - 
  MAX(CASE WHEN publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN superhero_count ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM dc_marvel_counts;

WITH dc_marvel_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    publisher.publisher_name,
    COUNT(superhero.id) AS superhero_count
  FROM 
    publisher
    INNER JOIN superhero ON publisher.id = superhero.publisher_id
  WHERE 
    publisher.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
  GROUP BY 
    publisher.publisher_name
)
SELECT 
  MAX(CASE WHEN publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN superhero_count ELSE 0 END) - 
  MAX(CASE WHEN publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN superhero_count ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM dc_marvel_counts;

WITH dc_marvel_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    p.publisher_name,
    COUNT(s.id) AS superhero_count
  FROM superhero s
  JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
  WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
  GROUP BY p.publisher_name
),
pivoted AS (
  SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN superhero_count END) AS dc_count,
    MAX(CASE WHEN publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN superhero_count END) AS marvel_count
  FROM dc_marvel_counts
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN dc_count > marvel_count THEN 'DC Comics'
    WHEN marvel_count > dc_count THEN 'Marvel Comics'
    ELSE 'Tie'
  END AS publisher_with_more_superheroes,
  ABS(dc_count - marvel_count) AS difference
FROM pivoted;

WITH publisher_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    p.publisher_name,
    COUNT(s.id) AS superhero_count
  FROM superhero s
  JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
  WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
  GROUP BY p.publisher_name
),
dc_marvel AS (
  SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN superhero_count END) AS dc_count,
    MAX(CASE WHEN publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN superhero_count END) AS marvel_count
  FROM publisher_counts
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN dc_count > marvel_count THEN 'DC Comics'
    WHEN marvel_count > dc_count THEN 'Marvel Comics'
    ELSE 'Tie'
  END AS publisher_with_more_superheroes,
  ABS(dc_count - marvel_count) AS difference
FROM dc_marvel;
